data.content: Implemented another settings color/pizazz pass focused on OpenRouter and sheet shell: added stronger purple/green gradients, glow accents, richer security-dialog section cards, and brighter model-table interaction states. Quality gates passed in dedicated worktree: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1950 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Integrated to origin/main as 6d71f2c.
